message:
style(engine): rustfmt reformatting and test cleanup across 9 files

Rustfmt line-wrapping adjustments in evidence_ledger (build_artifact_node_id
format string, BoundaryContext/BTreeMap constructors), attestation_handshake,
demotion_rollback, and their integration tests.

adversarial_campaign: remove redundant snapshot/telemetry assertions from
the serialization round-trip test — these duplicate the dedicated
snapshot/telemetry tests and were asserting on default values that may
change independently.

seqlock_fastpath: remove dead code that was already tested elsewhere.

seqlock_reader_writer_contract: expand test coverage for writer-reader
interaction edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
